content:
Most Vitamin C serums oxidize before they reach your skin. LuxDermis Renewal Serum uses a stabilized ascorbic acid derivative — a form that stays active in the formula and absorbs into the dermis where collagen synthesis begins.

The clinical result: 94% of participants in our 8-week trial saw a measurable reduction in fine lines. That is not a tagline. That is peer-reviewed data, available on request.

The 23% Vitamin C complex is paired with a triple-weight hyaluronic acid formula — high, medium, and low molecular weight — designed to hydrate at every depth of the epidermis. Together, they work at the levels where visible change actually happens.

Fragrance-free. Dermatologist-tested and co-developed. Suitable for sensitive skin. COSMOS certified organic. Leaping Bunny certified vegan and cruelty-free. Packaged in an airless pump to prevent oxidation — 18-month shelf life guaranteed.

Available in 30ml ($98) and 60ml ($165). Clinical trial data available upon request.
